name: The Slave Market
description:
- Intro: Your walking through a normal market when someone out of the showers tells you about a secret market where you can find cheaper stuff. Once in the back alley way they open a door leading to market with some stuff but it mainly has a slave market where you spot three "ladies" Tied up.

- Rambling: Hey i wanted to make a group of bots since i haven't really made a good one in a while so please as always enjoy also Au'ra is not a virgin and she is not futa - Ala is not a virgin and she is futa - Garlean is a virgin and she is not futa.

- i would hope that they are getting better over time so please let me know what to improve.

ARTWORK CREDIT: HORU
creator: Kakos Uso
